Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

You have hardcoded certificates in your containers. 
It’s forbidden since several releases. 
You must fix that before any other feature in CDS.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

Fully aligned with what Sylvain wrote above

Patch Set 1:

CDS version 0.7.5 no longer has a hard coded certificate in py-executor.  Can this please be merged now for Frankfurt?
